source_pr.title: planner, statistics: fix panic in plan replayer debug trace and add more tests
source_pr.body:
### What problem does this PR solve?


Issue Number: ref #43069 close #43412

Problem Summary:

`endIdx == 0` is not considered in `debugTraceTopNRange`

### What is changed and how it works?

We should have splitted this PR into several PRs, but it needs to be cherry-picked to v7.1, so I put them in one PR.

- Fix out-of-range panic in `debugTraceTopNRange` (`statistics/debugtrace.go`)
- Make the `testdata` handle comments in `*_in.json` properly. (`testkit/testdata/testdata.go`, `*_in.json`)
- Make the process of iterating the indexes and columns stable in `Selectivity()`. (`statistics/selectivity.go`)
- Add more tests for the debug trace. (`statistics/trace_test.go`, `statistics/testdata/trace_suite_{in,out}.json`)
- Add 2 failpoints to make the tests stable (`planner/core/debugtrace.go`, `server/optimize_trace_test.go`, `server/testdata/optimizer_suite_out.json`, `statistics/cmsketch.go`)

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [x] Unit test
- [ ] Integration test
- [ ] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- [ ] No code

Side effects

- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory
- [ ] Breaking backward compatibility

Documentation

- [ ] Affects user behaviors
- [ ] Contains syntax changes
- [ ] Contains variable changes
- [ ] Contains experimental features
- [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility

### Release note

<!-- compatibility change, improvement, bugfix, and new feature need a release note -->

Please refer to [Release Notes Language Style Guide](https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/release-notes-style-guide.html) to write a quality release note.

```release-note
None
```
